personal.name: Soham Shirke
personal.about: Passionate Computer Engineering student at TSEC with a strong focus on full-stack development. I love building scalable applications and exploring new technologies. Constantly learning and pushing boundaries in the dev world.

projects.title: Google Doc Clone
projects.description: Built a Google Docs–style collaborative editor using Next.js with a rich text editor, real-time multi-user collaboration, document management, authentication via Clerk, and data persistence with Convex, featuring a modern responsive UI.

projects.title: URL Shortener API
projects.description: Built a URL Shortener API using Express.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Drizzle ORM, enabling fast redirection through Redis caching and reliable data persistence. Implemented JWT-based authentication with secure password hashing and full CRUD operations for URL management, demonstrating backend architecture and efficient caching strategies.

projects.title: Wanderlust
projects.description: Built a modern and responsive travel website using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Aceternity UI, and shadcn/ui, featuring smooth animations, clean layouts, and an engaging, user-friendly experience.

achievements.title: TSEC CodeCell Coding Challenge
achievements.description: Ranked 3rd overall in a 10-week TSEC CodeCell coding challenge
